{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231501137EBD9298291FBC19F8CA"}"},"total":641},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7478539001911886617","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者写的比较客观，比较好，没有被昔日之仇蒙蔽双眼，我一直认为对他们的轻视是对先辈的不尊重，所以很难找到可以看的这种书，但作者处理的相当好。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1741239118,"group_id":"7472390526377937982","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"量变引起质变，质变引起巨变(๑¯◡¯๑)（看不完，根本看不完）","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+mhG43uWgPGqZcf6UQ0mu5Q2gpex3eMpd5qbORdUVhe","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/41dd22db141e4f1e82e48dd8a51c1f68~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795146&x-signature=%2FQorzm1DZxK3JLU99Bz7zh092b0%3D","user_id":"1761879594632043","user_name":"赤色群星"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1761879594632043","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1749829542,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":24,"name":"气氛达人","small_url":"http://p6-novel.byteimg.com/novel-static/b7c8672db629fbb3d8f83a83721675dc~tplv-noop.image","sticker_type":2,"url":"http://p6-novel.byteimg.com/novel-static/d2c24adfe48394cad03d7b1d29d70622~tplv-noop.image"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7472390526377937982","book_info":{"abstract":"【医生，谍战，穿越，特工】
一个医生，穿越到民国再次成为一个医学生。
但是居然进入日军中成为一名天才军医。
可是他确实是个中国人，于是他开始了自己的另类救国，既然不能战场杀敌，那就在敌后搞搞破坏，或许也能发挥出一些作用。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oaa3e650826c21619c5c58556ae58adfe~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"大橘小猫","author_id":"","book_id":"7472390526377937982","book_name":"抗战：天才军医在鬼子军队当蛀虫","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#b08868","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":504,"name":"抗战谍战","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=504&name=抗战谍战&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":26,"name":"神医","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=26&name=神医&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":518,"name":"特工","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=518&name=特工&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7472390529615921726","read_count":"18666","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2064473"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.0","serial_count":"1018","tags":"抗战谍战,都市,神医,穿越,特工,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/b7d7ca4db089b30d2d5a7037b03f717f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779433273&x-signature=dmJOJWRHu9%2BvcyiFqhsPkdUZ5UU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2566709533753075","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"41"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231501137EBD9298291FBC19F8CA"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅 内容结构清晰，主角陈知文坚持钻研自己的事业，在自己能力范围内爱国，穷则独善其身，达则兼济天下，很理性不无脑，没有挂自己一步一步往上爬，有对当时社会的一个分析，还可以了解当时历史日军的罪行以及国际事件知识等。
真的很希望看到在陈的帮助影响下国内局势和国家实力能变得更好以及后来人对他的评价。还是很有看点的，可以去看一下"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773458237,"group_id":"7472390526377937982","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更3000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwyqqTV4flh88lrNoc8a337puugBpqLjoX/Y6aDWe4Lx","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b35c99220f7d46efb50cac8b749ea0b1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791452&x-signature=PoCuKdcs0qFpBTPG8RSDK5up%2FlU%3D","user_id":"3072499107496540","user_name":"混沌皮很顺利"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3072499107496540","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7472390526377937982","book_info":{"abstract":"【医生，谍战，穿越，特工】
